title: eriophyllum lanatum var. grandiflorum
intro: Eriophyllum lanatum var. grandiflorum, also known as the California fleabane or isocline woolly sunflower, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to the presence of sesquiterpenoids and other bioactive compounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, and has been used to treat colds, fever, and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
